questionText: How can we improve our daily lives
design: 2 topics × 5 synths × 4 paraphrases = 40, + 1 OFF-TOPIC noise statement (must stay unclustered) = 41 (archetype F). Tight wording.

synths.name: daily-cardio
paraphrases: Do daily cardio exercise such as running or cycling.
Do daily cardio exercise such as running and cycling.
Do daily cardio exercise like running or cycling.
Do daily cardio workouts such as running or cycling.

synths.name: strength-training
paraphrases: Do regular strength training with weights to build muscle.
Do regular strength training using weights to build muscle.
Do regular weight training with weights to build muscle.
Do regular strength training with weights to gain muscle.

synths.name: flexibility-stretching
paraphrases: Do daily stretching exercises to improve flexibility.
Do daily stretching exercises to increase flexibility.
Do daily stretching routines to improve flexibility.
Do daily stretching exercises to boost flexibility.

synths.name: active-commuting
paraphrases: Walk or bike to work instead of driving.
Walk or cycle to work instead of driving.
Walk or bike to work rather than driving.
Walk or bike to work instead of taking the car.

synths.name: team-sports
paraphrases: Join a local sports team to stay active.
Join a local sports team to keep active.
Join a community sports team to stay active.
Join a local sports team to stay fit and active.

synths.name: budget-monthly
paraphrases: Track a monthly budget to manage your spending.
Keep a monthly budget to manage your spending.
Track a monthly budget to control your spending.
Track a monthly budget to manage how you spend.

synths.name: emergency-fund
paraphrases: Build an emergency fund for unexpected expenses.
Build an emergency fund for unexpected costs.
Save an emergency fund for unexpected expenses.
Build up an emergency fund for unexpected expenses.

synths.name: pay-off-debt
paraphrases: Pay off your debt as quickly as you can.
Pay down your debt as quickly as you can.
Pay off your debts as quickly as possible.
Pay off your debt as fast as you can.

synths.name: invest-retirement
paraphrases: Invest regularly for your retirement.
Invest consistently for your retirement.
Invest regularly to save for retirement.
Invest regularly for your retirement years.

synths.name: cut-subscriptions
paraphrases: Cancel subscriptions you no longer use to save money.
Cancel unused subscriptions to save money.
Cancel subscriptions you do not use to save money.
Cancel subscriptions you no longer need to save money.

synths.name: off-topic-noise
paraphrases: Photosynthesis is the process by which plants convert sunlight into chemical energy.
